landing.badge_text: The smarter way to learn languages
landing.hero_subtitle: Create flashcards, take quizzes, and learn with AI-powered tools.
landing.feature_dictionaries_desc: Create and organize words in your own multilingual dictionaries.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Generate example phrases with one click using advanced AI.
landing.feature_study_desc: Study effectively with flashcards and quizzes.
landing.feature_community_desc: Browse and fork public dictionaries from other learners.
landing.step1_desc: Create your free account in seconds.
landing.step2_desc: Choose a language and start adding words.
landing.step3_desc: Study with flashcards, quizzes, and AI-generated examples.
landing.features_subheading: Learn smarter with customized utilities built for your learning curve.
landing.pricing_subtitle: Start free, upgrade when youre ready

tiers.title: Choose Your Plan
tiers.page_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your goals. Start free and upgrade when you need more power and zero distractions.
tiers.free_desc: Perfect for getting started and building your first dictionaries.
tiers.premium_desc: For serious learners who want the best experience without interruptions.

cookie_consent.message: We use cookies to improve your experience. By continuing, you agree to our cookie policy.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Lingdb, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
privacy.section1_content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as your email address, username, and learning progress. We also collect data via third-party providers like Supabase (authentication), OpenAI (AI features), and Iyzico (payments).
privacy.section2_content: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, track your learning progress, process payments, and communicate important updates.
privacy.section3_content: We do not sell your personal data. We only share data with service providers necessary for our operations (e.g., payment processors, cloud hosting).
privacy.section4_content: You have the right to access, export, or delete your personal data at any time. You can also opt-out of marketing emails in your settings.
privacy.section5_content: If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us at privacy@lingdb.com.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using Lingdb, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.
terms.section1_content: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
terms.section2_content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.section3_content: AI credits are provided based on your subscription tier. Unused credits do not roll over to the next month.
terms.section4_content: The Lingdb application and its original content are owned by Lingdb and protected by international copyright laws.
terms.section5_content: We reserve the right to terminate or suspend your account for violations of these terms.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This policy explains how use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience.
cookies.section1_content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences and analyze how you use our site.
cookies.section2_content: We use essential cookies for authentication (Supabase) and non-essential cookies for analytics and personalized advertisements (Google Adsense).
cookies.section3_content: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings or our cookie consent banner.
